action.reasoning: Observation: OOM error during backward pass with batch_train=64/dev=128 on wav2vec2-base (26.9GiB used, trying to alloc ~5GiB more). Previous collate/attention_mask issues fixed but no EER yet after 5 iters. Analysis: Variable-length padding + full fine-tune in fp32 + large dev eval batches cause peak mem during grad. Root cause confirmed by error trace. Decision: Add os.environ for expandable_segments, reduce batches (train=16, dev=32), introduce GradScaler+autocast(fp16) in train/eval loops for ~50% mem reduction, increase num_workers=8 for throughput, update predict.py similarly with autocast and batch=64. Run 3-epoch train then submit_eval for first baseline EER and time measurement per workflow rules.
